content:
After a week of release of Saya, she still had skill named "Biya sammunam" mysterious sanskrit word, and it's spread more in the text related to Saya after yesterday's update in korean client.
Preview and PV released a Korean version but radio drama were passed without notice. Lyra said in-game media is fine but there was messy caption that didn't match with actual records.
If everything was machine translation like before, I'd think I have more jokes to talk but now you have hired translator who leaves Hello as last word and missing. 
You may be honored to this collaboration, but I feel ashamed to show this game to people around me who like Saya no Uta in this situation.
I think your slots for promise already full, so please answer with the actual improvements.
thread_title: Before the Saya no Uta Collaboration Begins
